_comment: Owned by @testing (issue #283), NOT spec/ (spec/ is maintainer-owned per AGENTS.md). Maps each spec/examples/*.logo filename to the minimal set of spec/conformance.md profile ids it requires, using the same ids as scripts/harness/index.mjs's PROFILE_DEPS. scripts/examples-gate.mjs skips (with a visible notice) any example that needs a profile not yet in IMPLEMENTED_PROFILES, rather than counting it as passed. Every spec/examples/*.logo file MUST have an entry here, or the gate fails loudly instead of silently ignoring it.
